channel.title: AB Smart: The Coolest Person Who Ever Lived
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on AB Smart: The Coolest Person Who Ever Lived

item.title: Blogpost
item.description:
Welcome to my site. I’m brand new at making things on a somewhat professional level, and that certainly applies here. I’m doing my best to serve this site securely and safely.

I hope I can bring some more of my content here in time, and that eventually this will be the ultimate hub for all of my stuff.

Thanks for visiting!

-AB

item.title: About
item.description:
Here is some content. This is all in Markdown.

  • ahhhh yes formatted text
  • the old magicks
  • i had forgotten their power

but can you remember how to do things : things aren’t what they seem

  1. I don’t care
  2. I do care
  3. This list is inclusive
